contains_any: Work owns requested work and its completion
Work owns requested business work and the decision that work is complete

propositions.name: Agent Execution owns run admission
accepts: Agent Execution independently own* ... run admission
rejects: Agent Execution does not own* ... run admission
Agent Execution is not ... run admission authority

propositions.name: Agent Execution owns execution identity
accepts: Agent Execution independently own* ... execution identity
rejects: Agent Execution does not own* ... execution identity
Agent Execution is not ... execution identity authority

propositions.name: Agent Execution owns lease fencing
accepts: Agent Execution independently own* ... lease fencing
rejects: Agent Execution does not own* ... lease fencing
Agent Execution is not ... lease fencing authority

propositions.name: Agent Execution owns terminal execution outcomes
accepts: Agent Execution own* ... terminal execution outcome*
Agent Execution independently own* ... terminal execution outcome*
rejects: Agent Execution does not own* ... terminal execution outcome*
Agent Execution is not ... terminal execution outcome authority

propositions.name: Work owns business completion
rejects: Work does not own* ... completion
Work ... does not decide* ... complete
Work is not ... completion authority

propositions.name: Project Knowledge owns knowledge acceptance
accepts: Project Knowledge ... own* ... accepted project view
rejects: Project Knowledge does not own* ... acceptance
Project Knowledge does not own* ... accepted project view
Project Knowledge does not own* ... candidate reconciliation
Project Knowledge is not ... acceptance authority

propositions.name: Agent Execution is upstream of Work
rejects: Agent Execution is not upstream ... Work
Work ... upstream ... Agent Execution
Work -> Agent Execution
Work → Agent Execution
Agent Execution <- Work
Agent Execution ← Work

propositions.name: Agent Execution is upstream of Project Knowledge
accepts: Agent Execution ... fan* out ... Project Knowledge
rejects: Agent Execution is not upstream ... Project Knowledge
Project Knowledge ... upstream ... Agent Execution
Project Knowledge -> Agent Execution
Project Knowledge → Agent Execution
Agent Execution <- Project Knowledge
Agent Execution ← Project Knowledge
